# minio_iam_service_accounts (Data Source)

Lists service accounts (access keys) for a specific IAM user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_iam_service_accounts" "app" {
  user = "app-user"
}

output "service_account_keys" {
  value = data.minio_iam_service_accounts.app.service_accounts[*].access_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user` (String) IAM user name to list service accounts for.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `service_accounts` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--service_accounts))

<a id="nestedatt--service_accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `service_accounts`

Read-Only:

- `access_key` (String)
